prompt: Two-step: (a) forward an inbox message (or any visible message) to test@example.com — save as DRAFT, do NOT send. (b) Archive the original inbox message. If no seed message exists, fallback: create a NEW draft with subject 'Fwd: KinBench 157' to test@example.com, then write 'archived' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/157-archive-confirm.txt as the archive-step paper trail.
